nasb.text: She went and reported to those who had been with Him, while they were mourning and weeping.

esv.text: She went and told those who had been with him, as they mourned and wept.

cnv.text: 她就去告訴那些向來和耶穌在一起的人，那時他們正在悲哀哭泣。

ccb.text: 玛丽亚赶到门徒那里，看见他们仍然在哭泣哀悼，

csbs.text: 她去告诉那些向来与耶稣在一起的人，他们正在悲伤、哀哭。
